description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by a well-maintained garden and a paved driveway. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the windows are large and rectangular, arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The property features a fenced yard with various outdoor amenities, including a swing set, a trampoline, a shed, and several trees and shrubs. The front of the house has a small porch area with a bench and decorative landscaping, while the backyard includes a patio with outdoor seating and a dining area. The house is set within a rectangular plot bordered by a hedge, providing privacy and a clear boundary. The overall design is clean and functional, with a focus on open outdoor spaces and modern architectural lines.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring outdoor amenities and a fenced boundary.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, porch with a bench, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard with a swing set, trampoline, shed, and garden features.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the patio area, outdoor dining set, and more of the fenced garden and shed.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the front and side, including the porch, patio, and various garden elements.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small porch, bench, and minimal decorative landscaping
